summary: Iteration 58 - Bug Fix Verification Complete. All 3 reported bugs have been FIXED: 1) useRef import added (was causing runtime crash), 2) fetchLiveData stale closure fixed (removed scorecardData from deps, used functional update for setBbbData), 3) Polling useEffect now triggers for both 'live' and 'open' status matches. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIX VERIFIED: Line 1 - useRef now properly imported from React (was used but not imported)
BUG FIX VERIFIED: Lines 88-146 - fetchLiveData useCallback no longer has scorecardData in deps, uses functional update for setBbbData to avoid stale closure
BUG FIX VERIFIED: Lines 159-172 - Polling useEffect triggers for both 'live' and 'open' status matches
Demo celebration buttons (SIX, FOUR, WICKET, WINNER) all trigger CelebrationOverlay correctly
CelebrationOverlay renders with correct animation types (fire for SIX, blue for FOUR, red stumps for WICKET)
AI Commentary Tab shows all sections: Match Pulse, Phase Analysis, Timeline, MVPs
Scorecard Tab displays live batting/bowling stats correctly
Auto-celebration detection logic in fetchLiveData compares previous vs current scorecard using useRef
seed_data_creation: None - used existing live match 9c53d4ca-10c2-4e18-a723-77d4bd205640 (PBKS vs GT)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 58 verified the bug fixes for: 1) Missing useRef import, 2) Stale closure in fetchLiveData causing infinite re-render, 3) Polling not triggering for 'open' status matches. All features tested: Login flow, Match Detail Page, Demo celebration buttons (SIX/FOUR/WICKET/WINNER), CelebrationOverlay animations, Scorecard tab with live data, Live tab with AI Commentary (Match Pulse, Phase Analysis, Timeline, MVPs). Live match ID: 9c53d4ca-10c2-4e18-a723-77d4bd205640 (PBKS vs GT, status: live).
